name: Big Game Hunter
description: Elite enemies swarm the Spire and drop better rewards.

name: Binary
description: Card rewards now contain only 2 cards.

name: Cursed Run
description: At the start of each Act, add a random Curse to your deck.

name: Deadly Events
description: Unknown rooms can now contain Elites, but are also more likely to contain Treasure rooms.

name: Draft
description: Choose 10 card rewards to replace your starting deck.

name: Flight
description: You may ignore paths when choosing the next room to travel to.

name: Hoarder
description: Whenever you add a card to your deck, add 2 additional copies. You can no longer remove cards from your deck at the Merchant.

name: Insanity
description: Start with a random deck of 30 cards.

name: Midas
description: Enemies drop 200% more gold, but you can no longer Smith at Rest Sites.

name: Murderous
description: You start each combat with 3 Strength. All enemies start combat with 3 Strength.

name: Night Terrors
description: Resting at Rest Sites heals all of your HP, but costs 5 Max HP.

name: Sealed Deck
description: Choose 10 out of 30 cards to replace your starting deck.

name: Specialized
description: Start with 5 copies of a single card.

name: Terminal
description: Whenever you enter a new room, lose 1 Max HP. Start each combat with 5 Plating.

name: Vintage
description: Normal enemies drop relics instead of cards.
